name: cart_page_4_cart

facts.note: The direct cart-page crawl captured an empty cart state with a "Continue browsing here" CTA.
No recovery recommendations or suggested products are visible in this empty-cart state.
The announcement bar mentions free shipping, but there is no progress module in the empty-cart state.
No trust strip or return reassurance is visible in the cart body.
Only the empty-cart recovery CTA is visible.

observed_strengths.observation: The empty-cart state offers a clear path back to browsing.

missing_or_weak.observation: The empty-cart state does not try to recover intent with recommendations or reassurance.

purchase_path_notes: This artifact is an empty-cart state and should not be used as evidence for populated-cart merchandising.
